mission.title: podman-desktop: Compose setup fails when there is already docker-compose
mission.description: Compose setup fails when there is already docker-compose. Community-reported issue.

steps.title: Identify podman-desktop troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your podman-desktop deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n podman-desktop -l app.kubernetes.io/name=podman-desktop
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=podman-desktop -n podman-desktop --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review podman-desktop configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant podman-desktop configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n podman-desktop -l app.kubernetes.io/name=podman-desktop
kubectl get configmap -n podman-desktop -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=podman-desktop
```
### Bug description

For some reason, podman-desktop failed to find docker-compose under `/usr/local/bin/docker-compose`. I don't remember how it is installed but maybe by podman-desktop since compose extension did not show setup button.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Compose setup fails when there is already docker-compose
steps.description:
### What does this PR do?

Copy docker-compose on macos using cp command with -f option to overwrite existing file.

### Screenshot / video of UI

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5ba6aabd-60b1-45e2-8ab8-501e13525a1e

### What issues does this PR fix or reference?

Fix #5334.

### How to
```yaml
Unable to install docker-compose binary: Command execution failed with exit code 1: Command execution failed with exit code 1
```

steps.title: Confirm Compose setup fails when there is already… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=podman-desktop -n podman-desktop --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n podman-desktop --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with podman-desktop installed or the issue environment reproducible.
